en_title: 'This Is a Deeply Odd State of Affairs' — Tech Experts Slam Activision's 'Low Effort' Call of Duty: Black Ops PS5 Port
cn_title: 技术专家痛批《使命召唤：黑色行动》PS5移植版
subtitle: 16年前的画面
opus_summary: 《使命召唤：黑色行动》移植版因价格和画面表现遭批评。Digital Foundry指出，游戏仅以1080p、60Hz运行，缺少抗锯齿，也未充分利用PS5性能；买齐全部内容需140美元(约合人民币951元)。

paragraphs.en: Activision’s ports of the much-loved Call of Duty: Black Ops 1 and 2 on PlayStation 4 and PlayStation 5 immediately raised eyebrows for their price, but they’ve come under fire for their disappointing graphics performance, too.
paragraphs.cn: 动视将广受喜爱的《使命召唤：黑色行动1》和《黑色行动2》移植到PS4和PS5后，售价立即引发质疑；移植版令人失望的画面表现也遭到批评。

paragraphs.en: The tech experts at Digital Foundry have taken a look at the port of the original 2010 Black Ops to PlayStation, and had a few choice words to say about the work Activision put into it. Chief among their complaints is the fact the Black Ops port runs at 1080p, not 4K, despite being a 16-year-old game that began life on the PlayStation 3 and Xbox 360. Not only that, there’s no anti-aliasing.
paragraphs.cn: Digital Foundry的技术专家检查了2010年初代《黑色行动》的PlayStation移植版，对动视投入的工作说了不少重话。他们最主要的批评是：这款16年前、最初登陆PS3和XBOX 360的游戏，移植版运行分辨率只有1080p，而非4K。不仅如此，游戏还没有抗锯齿。

paragraphs.en: DF also criticized the frame-rate, which is limited to 60Hz even on PS5. “A 1080p60 presentation would be potentially acceptable for the PS4 version - and there is one! - but for a brand new PS5 conversion, it's disappointingly poor and well below what the hardware is capable of,” DF said.
paragraphs.cn: DF还批评了帧率：即便在PS5上也被限制为60Hz。DF表示：「1080p、60帧的表现对PS4版本来说或许可以接受——而它确实有这样的版本！——但对于全新的PS5移植版而言，这种表现令人失望，远低于硬件能够达到的水平。」

paragraphs.en: “For a native PS5 title and a somewhat high-profile port, this is a deeply odd state of affairs,” DF continued. “Even the game's obvious visual blemishes are preserved: shadow quality was necessarily poor back in the day, but why preserve that problem in the present day when so much more graphics horsepower is available?”
paragraphs.cn: DF继续说道：「对于一款原生PS5游戏和一款有一定知名度的移植版来说，这种情况实在非常奇怪。游戏明显的画面瑕疵甚至也被保留了下来：当年阴影质量差情有可原，但如今拥有强大得多的图形性能，为何还要保留这个问题？」

paragraphs.en: If there’s a silver lining, the PS5 and PS4 versions are better than the one currently accessible on Xbox Series X and S and Xbox One via backwards compatibility, which sticks to the original Xbox 360 resolution of 608p. There are no Xbox enhancements at all.
paragraphs.cn: 如果说还有一丝安慰，那就是PS5和PS4版本优于目前通过向下兼容在XBOX Series和XBOX One上运行的版本，后者仍保持原XBOX 360的608p分辨率。XBOX版本完全没有任何增强。

paragraphs.en: We’ve already reported on the pricing of the PlayStation Black Ops ports , which cost $40 each. Both games also offer a separate season pass priced $29.99. So, if you want the complete experience (Black Ops 1 and 2 and all the DLC), you have to pay $140 for games. All this for games that came out over a decade ago.
paragraphs.cn: 我们此前已经报道过PlayStation版《黑色行动》移植版的价格：每部40美元(约合人民币272元)。两款游戏还分别提供29.99美元(约合人民币204元)的季票。因此，如果想获得完整体验（《黑色行动1》和《黑色行动2》及全部DLC），总共要为这些游戏支付140美元(约合人民币951元)。而它们在十多年前就已发售。

paragraphs.en: It’s worth noting that if you are a PlayStation Plus subscriber you get a massive discount. In that case, both games cost $20 each and their season passes are $9 each, which makes for a $58 total if you want everything. This discount runs until August 6.
paragraphs.cn: 值得注意的是，PlayStation Plus订阅者可以享受大幅折扣。折扣期间，两款游戏每部售价20美元(约合人民币136元)，季票每份9美元(约合人民币61元)；如果想要全部内容，总价为58美元(约合人民币394元)。折扣持续至8月6日。
